ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had trouble with thinking clearly or memory problems in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had people complain that he/she is not completing necessary tasks in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had to go to someone other than their prescribing physician to get sufficient pain relief from medications in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had taken medications differently from how they are prescribed in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had seriously thought about hurting themself in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how much time participant had spent thinking about opioid medications in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant was in an argument in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had trouble controlling anger in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant needed to take medications belonging to someone else in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant worried about how they were handling their medications in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often others worried about how participant was handling their medications in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had to make an emergency phone call or show up at a clinic without an appointment in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Seldom; 2 = Sometimes; 3 = Often; 4 = Very Often

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had gotten angry with people in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had to take more medication than prescribed in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant used pain medicine for symptoms other than pain in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).

ElementDescription: Scale describing how often participant had to visit the emergency room in the past 30 days, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).

ElementDescription: Calculated overall (summative) score, as a part of Current Opioid Misuse Measure (COMM).
Notes: Sum of elements: COMMTrbThkClrPast30DayScl, COMMCompTaskPast30DayScl, COMMOthPhyscMedPst30DyScl, COMMTakMedDifPast30DayScl, COMMHurtSelfPast30DayScl, COMMOpiThkPast30DayScl, COMMArgOftPast30DayScl, COMMAngConPast30DayScl, COMMSomElsMedPast30DayScl, COMMHanMedWorPast30DayScl, COMMOthWorryPast30DayScl, COMMEmeCalAppPast30DayScl, COMMAngrOftnPast30DayScl, COMMTakMorMedPast30DayScl, COMMBorMedPast30DayScl, COMMOthSymPast30DayScl, COMMEmergRmPast30DayScl
